groups.thesis: Sector under pressure with avg YTD return of -11.7%. Weak breadth — just 1/5 stocks outperforming S&P 500. Only 40% above 50-day MA, trend weakening. Neutral momentum (avg RSI 47) — potential accumulation zone.
